news.summary: Authorities say a father fatally shot eight children, including seven of his own, in what appears to be a "domestic dispute".

news.headline: Funerals held across Lebanon during 10-day ceasefire
news.summary: Mourners across Lebanon are burying victims of the war with Israel during a 10-day ceasefire.
